name: Spiced & Ginger
description: A refreshing highball of BACARDÍ Spiced rum and ginger ale finished with lime. Refresh with this snappy little number. BACARDÍ Spiced rum, bubbly ginger and a zesty hint of lime come together in one tasty cocktail.
recipe_steps: Fill a glass with ice cubes.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Spiced rum, followed by the ginger ale.
Give it all a gentle stir.
searchable_text: Spiced & Ginger main rum BACARDÍ Spiced rum A refreshing highball of BACARDÍ Spiced rum and ginger ale finished with lime. Refresh with this snappy little number. BACARDÍ Spiced rum, bubbly ginger and a zesty hint of lime come together in one tasty cocktail. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Spiced rum, 100 ml ginger ale recipe steps Fill a glass with ice cubes. Pour in the BACARDÍ Spiced rum, followed by the ginger ale. Give it all a gentle stir. Garnish with a lime wedge.
